ordinanceLabel: AMC Title 8 (Building) | Title 9 Article 45 (ADU) · ecode360 AR4900
buildingDept: Los Angeles County Building and Safety Division (contracted)
buildingDeptNote: Artesia contracts all building and safety services to LA County BSD. Permits are issued and inspected through the EPIC-LA portal.
